author: Flours
text: Tracker plugin (bl-4522, src/tracker/) already SHIPS the remote-side acts this verb drives, all wire-driven and stealth-safe: sync(sync/pre)=fetch+ff-only(non-ff=contention), push(*/post), prime(prime/pre)=adopt-established / found-absent(bootstrap-on-miss) / stealth self-lock. So this ball is the CORE half: (1) wire the tracker into op-phases via the config/plugins registry symlinks; (2) build run()->Engine dispatch (still skeleton) so ops actually invoke the chain; (3) operating/->plugins/tracker/<enc-remote>/ symlink materialization + the landing model (tracker assumes operating exists); (4) transitive trail WALK (tracker handles ONE resolved binding per the §7 wire; it does not walk next:); (5) plumb 'bl prime --center <url>' to WRITE the pointer (tracker::pointer is READ-ONLY today) and make prime read the stealth.lock for W1 'locked, not auto-extending' (lock is written, not yet read). tracker::pointer::read already resolves committed next: over the wire remote.

author: Aphelia
text: Deferrals filed as follow-ups (scope: core scaffolding only, confirmed with user): bl-02c3 tracker adopt-into-empty (closes 2-hop loop), bl-4c54 config VALUES trail-layering (§4), bl-3d75 delivery prime.post re-materialization (§11), bl-154f diffless post-wire commit facts (§13).

author: Aphelia
text:
§12/§13 prime + sync: run→engine dispatch, trail walk, pointer

Wire the checkout-lifecycle verbs to the engine so prime and sync stop printing a plan and run the chain. The tracker plugin (bl-4522) already ships the remote acts they drive; this is the core half.

edge resolves host inputs at the boundary (bl-bfa8 rule). prime bootstraps the landing on a miss (substrate: orphan balls branch, seeded config, default tracker wiring + bin bind) and runs the prime chain; sync walks the trail (pure, stop-on-revisit) to its terminus and runs the sync chain. prime --center/--stealth write/clear the committed next: pointer (tracker::pointer gains write/clear); prime reads stealth.lock for notice W1.

Diffless ops omit command + both task states on the §7 wire (OpContext::diffless). Scope is core scaffolding only: tracked-mode fresh-clone materialization (bl-02c3), config-value trail-layering (bl-4c54), delivery prime.post (bl-3d75), and diffless post commit facts (bl-154f) are filed follow-ups.
